description_long: This is a modern emergency ambulance vehicle with a boxy rear compartment and a cab-over-engine design, painted primarily in a high-visibility yellow-green color with reflective checkered green stripes and red-orange chevrons on the rear. The vehicle features prominent 'AMBULANCE' signage on the front, sides, and rear, as well as blue Star of Life medical symbols. The roof is equipped with a blue emergency light bar, multiple smaller lights, and two roof antennas. The rear has two large, vertically-hinged doors with warning signage and reflective patterns for safety. The side windows are tinted, and the vehicle rides on robust, silver wheels suitable for urban and emergency environments.
description: A high-visibility yellow-green emergency ambulance with reflective markings, blue light bar, and medical symbols, featuring a boxy rear compartment and prominent signage.
description_view_0: Rear view showing two large, vertically-hinged compartment doors with red-orange chevrons, 'AMBULANCE' signage, and warning labels.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the checkered green reflective stripe, Star of Life symbol, side door, and emergency service text.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the 'AMBULANCE' text in reverse, blue light bar, windshield, and front grille.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with checkered green stripe, Star of Life symbol, and side compartment details.
attribute_ambulance_signage: AMBULANCE text on front, rear, and sides; reflective chevrons and medical service markings
